name: inv5-fail-open-held-lock
notes: Advisory locks are fail-open. With .veridelta/lock held, `vdelta run` degrades to transparent passthrough: no report is emitted (expectReport:false) and the child's exit code passes through unchanged. Once the lock is released, recording resumes normally and a comparison succeeds -- proving veridelta is never worse than its absence, and that the degradation is transient, not corrupting.
